sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet package for BLUE 1717 REAR COVER, part number MKK-200100, Rev.1 dated 2025.10.16.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval documentation covering revision history, material list, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria for customer ㈜H&abyz.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE 1717 REAR COVER and part number is MKK-200100.
Applicable models are G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
Rev.1 dated 2025.10.16 records material and post-treatment changes and added shape.
Material list identifies AL(7075) for product appearance and Anodizing for product surface.
QC process flow marks Mass-Prod. and includes receiving inspection, CNC machining, sanding, anodizing, shipment inspection, and packaging.
Product inspection criteria require full inspection for appearance, dimensions, fit, and weight.

reviewFlags.reason: No government regulator or jurisdiction is identified; authorityOrJurisdiction is limited to the customer and supplier named in the approval sheet.
Material evidence conflicts: the raw material list states AL(7075), while the QC receiving inspection row lists material AL(6061).
Preprocessed spreadsheet text has fragmented table structure and minor extraction typos such as 'Produst/Part', so some tabular relationships may require source-file review.
